overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through an industrial urban district at dusk. The journey progresses from warehouse-lined streets through a gas station intersection, past highway overpasses and billboards, and into a dense neon-lit city core with towering skyscrapers.

events.description: vehicle makes a sharp right turn at intersection

agents.ego_description: driving through industrial streets and executing a right turn at the intersection

entered.detail: large concrete industrial structure with flat roof and minimal windows
multiple utility poles with overhead electrical wires spanning the street
tall palm tree visible against the dusk sky
modern street lighting fixture with horizontal arm

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a vehicle driving through an industrial warehouse district at dusk. The camera passes concrete industrial buildings and utility poles with overhead power lines. Around 6.5 seconds, the vehicle executes a sharp right turn at an intersection, revealing more industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to commercial gas station intersection

events.description: large illuminated CHOOH sign becomes visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the road toward the intersection with the CHOOH gas station

entered.detail: large illuminated commercial sign for CHOOH gas station glowing yellow against the dusk sky
concrete wall with blue and green graffiti tags
illuminated advertising billboard with colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: After the turn, the vehicle drives toward a commercial intersection where a large illuminated CHOOH gas station sign dominates the view. The surroundings transition from pure industrial to commercial with graffiti-covered walls and digital billboards becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with gas station and pedestrian crossing

events.description: vehicle stops at red traffic light at the intersection
pedestrians begin crossing the street in front of the vehicle
traffic light changes and vehicle proceeds through intersection

agents.ego_description: stopped at the red light waiting for pedestrians to cross, then proceeding through the intersection

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street from left to right in front of the stopped vehicle

entered.detail: green illuminated canopy structure of the gas station with fuel pumps underneath
traffic signal showing red then changing to green
dark smoke rising from industrial stacks visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle arrives at the CHOOH gas station intersection and stops at a red light. Pedestrians cross the street in front of the vehicle while the CHOOH sign glows prominently on the left. After the light changes, the vehicle proceeds through the intersection, with industrial smoke plumes becoming visible ahead against the orange dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway with overpasses and billboards

events.description: driving under multiple highway overpasses and ramps
passing large digital billboards and industrial smokestacks

agents.ego_description: cruising along the multi-lane industrial highway following other vehicles

notable_agents.action: truck driving ahead in the same lane, emitting exhaust

entered.detail: complex network of elevated highway ramps and bridges crossing overhead
massive illuminated advertising screen showing colorful graphics on an orange support structure
large concrete industrial building with loading docks and metal fencing

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along an industrial highway passing under a complex network of overpasses and ramps. Large digital billboards on the left display advertisements while industrial warehouses line the right. Dark smoke plumes rise in the distance, and the vehicle follows a truck through this gritty industrial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban core with skyscrapers and neon signage

events.description: industrial gantries give way to towering neon-lit skyscrapers
passing under a pedestrian footbridge with neon-lit buildings dominating the skyline

agents.ego_description: navigating through the urban core approaching the towering city center buildings

entered.detail: large orange industrial cranes used for loading cargo containers
tall building with illuminated red neon structural lighting outlining its frame
elevated walkway crossing over the street with stairs on either side
tall building with large vertical white corporate logo signage

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions from industrial to dense urban core as massive gantry cranes and towering neon-lit skyscrapers come into view. The vehicle passes under a pedestrian footbridge while approaching the city center, where buildings feature prominent vertical signage and red neon structural lighting against the darkening dusk sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey that transforms from a gritty industrial warehouse district into a towering, neon-lit urban core at dusk. It begins by navigating past concrete buildings and overhead power lines before executing a sharp right turn that leads toward a commercial intersection. As the vehicle approaches a glowing CHOOH gas station sign, the environment shifts from pure industrial to a commercial zone filled with graffiti-covered walls and digital billboards. The scene then proceeds through a red light and under a complex network of highway overpasses and ramps, following a truck past rising plumes of dark smoke against an orange sky. Finally, the industrial corridor opens up into the dense city center, passing under a pedestrian footbridge as massive gantry cranes and skyscrapers with red neon structural lighting dominate the darkening horizon.
